ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mouse_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mouse movement */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the movement belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the movement */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the movement start time */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the movement end time */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movement in milliseconds */,
  "start_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the movement start point */,
  "start_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the movement start point */,
  "end_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the movement end point */,
  "end_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the movement end point */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the movement occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., smooth, jump) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mouse_movements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mouse_movements_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the session belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session start time */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session end time */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in milliseconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "click_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the event belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the click */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the click event */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the click point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the click point */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the click occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "click_type" TEXT /* Type of click (e.g., left, right, double) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_click_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_click_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ui_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the interaction belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the interaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "element" TEXT /* Name of the UI element interacted with */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, hover, focus) */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the interaction occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, hover, focus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heatmaps" (
  "heatmap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heatmap */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the heatmap belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the heatmap belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the heatmap data */,
  "data" TEXT /* Heatmap data in binary format */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the heatmap was generated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heatmap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heatmaps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heatmaps_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "click_through_rates" (
  "ctr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click-through rate */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the rate belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the rate belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rate data */,
  "element" TEXT /* Name of the UI element */,
  "rate" REAL /* Click-through rate value */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the CTR was calculated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ctr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_click_through_rates_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_click_through_rates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigation flow */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the flow belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the flow belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the flow data */,
  "path" TEXT /* Navigation path as a string */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_flows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_flows_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Model data in binary format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last training */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
